quoteFirst: March 2 at Bearville 11.30 A. M. Jim Greene's camp Lake Clear at 4.35 P. M. March 3 left camp at 7 A. M. Bill Emerson's camp 9.47 A. M. Reached moose yard on back side Fern Brook Ridge
quoteLast: 3 moose in yard--Henry," he said, lifting his head and abruptly addressing his companion, "some of those poachers have mighty cute tricks."
